description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Clang Tests that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has three jobs: osx-qmake, docker-qbs, and linux-qmake. The osx-qmake job runs on macos-10.15, installs Qt5, checks out the code, and runs qmake and make with different C++ standards. The docker-qbs job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, and builds and tests with Docker using different images. The linux-qmake job runs on different Ubuntu versions, caches and installs Qt, sets up Clang, checks out the code, and runs qmake and make with different Qt versions, Clang versions, and C++ standards.
